reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B) focuses on access authorization, which directly relates to Kubernetes RBAC (Role-Based Access Control). In Kubernetes, access authorization can be enforced by ensuring that no users or service accounts have unnecessary administrative privileges, such as the 'cluster-admin' role. Implementing least privilege principles and reviewing role bindings are essential to meet this control.
title: 164_308_a_4_ii_b: 164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B) Access authorization
